title: Help for carers of Alzheimer's disease patients
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A meeting will be held on...
bodyText:
MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A meeting will be held on Friday, 13 June, at Hartenbos Versorgingsoord for the carers of Alzheimer's disease patients.


> The aim of the meeting is to support the carers.


All are welcome to attend the function, which starts at 14:00. Entry is free.

Hartenbos Versorgingsoord, a senior citizens' complex, is in Graaff Reinet Avenue, Hartenbos.


> For more information on the meeting, contact Rina Fourie (084 040 0111), who works at Hartenbos Versorgingsoord.


She and Hettie Theron of the Association for Dementia and Alzheimer’s of South Africa NPC (ADASA) will be speaking at the event.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
